inputs:
  - resolved.address: <addr-under-usdm-control-script>   # bech32 verbatim
                                                          # because no entity
                                                          # declared for the full
                                                          # address
    resolved.coin: 5.000000 ADA
outputs:
  - address: alice
    coin: 4.500000 ADA
    assets: { usdm: 1000 }
mint:
  usdm-control: { usdm: +1000 }
witnesses:
  scripts: [usdm-control]
fee: 0.500000 ADA
